title: tecticornia undulata
intro: Tecticornia undulata, also known as the wavy glasswort, is a type of succulent plant found in Australia's western region. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Tecticornia undulata include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce swelling, and exhibit antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into a tea, salve, or infused oil for topical application, making it a useful addition to natural remedies.
